# Model Weights (35)

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

- [openai/CLIP](https://github.com/openai/CLIP) — ⭐ 33,562 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Multimodal — This repository contains CLIP, a foundational vision model that learns visual concepts from natural language supervision. It's used for zero-shot image classification and understanding by predicting the most relevant text snippet given an image.
- [OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V](https://github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM-V) — ⭐ 24,542 · `Python` · Multimodal — A pocket-sized, open-source Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) designed for ultra-efficient image and video understanding on mobile devices, excelling in benchmarks against larger models.
- [shiyu-coder/Kronos](https://github.com/shiyu-coder/Kronos) — ⭐ 23,512 · `Python` · Finance — Kronos is an open-source foundation model designed to interpret the 'language' of financial markets, including candlestick charts. Trained on extensive financial records, it aims to deliver superior performance in market analysis.
- [AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT](https://github.com/AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT) — ⭐ 20,018 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Models — FinGPT provides open-source financial Large Language Models (LLMs), with trained model weights released on HuggingFace, aiming to revolutionize financial applications.
- [google-research/timesfm](https://github.com/google-research/timesfm) — ⭐ 19,417 · `Python` · Data — TimesFM, a Time Series Foundation Model by Google Research, is a pretrained model specifically developed for time-series forecasting.
- [OpenBMB/VoxCPM](https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM) — ⭐ 17,644 · `Python` · Audio — VoxCPM2 is a tokenizer-free Text-to-Speech (TTS) model designed for generating multilingual speech, enabling creative voice design, and performing true-to-life voice cloning. It focuses on advanced speech synthesis capabilities.
- [QwenLM/Qwen3-Coder](https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-Coder) — ⭐ 16,543 · `Python` · Code — Qwen3-Coder is a specialized code-focused version of the Qwen3 large language model series, developed by the Qwen team. It serves as a foundational model for code generation, understanding, and other programming assistance.
- [OpenGVLab/InternVL](https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternVL) — ⭐ 10,034 · `Python` · Multimodal — InternVL is an open-source family of vision-language models designed as an alternative to GPT-4o, capable of multimodal dialogue and tasks like image classification, video classification, semantic segmentation, and image-text retrieval.
- [OpenBMB/MiniCPM](https://github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM) — ⭐ 8,947 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Models — This repository hosts MiniCPM5-1B, a state-of-the-art 1 billion parameter large language model designed for efficient on-device execution. It achieves top performance among small models, outperforming larger counterparts across various benchmarks including knowledge, mathematics, and coding.
- [rednote-hilab/dots.ocr](https://github.com/rednote-hilab/dots.ocr) — ⭐ 8,606 · `Python` · Multimodal — dots-ocr is a 1.7B parameter open-source Vision-Language Model for multilingual document layout parsing, capable of processing text, tables, formulas, images, and PDFs in over 100 languages within a single unified system.
- [PriorLabs/TabPFN](https://github.com/PriorLabs/TabPFN) — ⭐ 6,497 · `Python` · Models — TabPFN is a foundation model optimized for tabular data, proficient in classification and regression tasks on small datasets. It aims to simplify machine learning by minimizing feature engineering and parameter tuning requirements.
- [MoonshotAI/Kimi-Audio](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Kimi-Audio) — ⭐ 4,602 · `Python` · Audio — Kimi-Audio is an open-source audio foundation model that specializes in understanding, generating, and conversing using audio. It was trained on a large dataset combining audio and text data.
- [PINTO0309/PINTO\_model\_zoo](https://github.com/PINTO0309/PINTO_model_zoo) — ⭐ 4,386 · `Python` · Models — A repository for storing models that have been inter-converted between various frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and ONNX. It offers a comprehensive collection of pre-trained models, including those for detection, pose estimation, and instance segmentation, for different deployment needs.
- [QwenLM/Qwen2.5-Omni](https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen2.5-Omni) — ⭐ 3,999 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Multimodal — Qwen2.5-Omni is an end-to-end multimodal AI model developed by Alibaba Cloud's Qwen team, designed to understand various inputs like text, audio, vision, and video, and generate real-time natural speech responses.
- [X-PLUG/mPLUG-DocOwl](https://github.com/X-PLUG/mPLUG-DocOwl) — ⭐ 2,376 · `Python` · Multimodal — A modularized multimodal large language model designed for comprehensive document understanding, specializing in OCR-free analysis of documents, charts, and tables.
- [microsoft/Magma](https://github.com/microsoft/Magma) — ⭐ 1,926 · `Python` · Multimodal — Magma is a foundation model designed for multimodal AI agents, presented at CVPR 2025.
- [FireRedTeam/FireRedASR](https://github.com/FireRedTeam/FireRedASR) — ⭐ 1,867 · `Python` · Audio — Provides open-source, industrial-grade automatic speech recognition (ASR) models for Mandarin, Chinese dialects, and English, with state-of-the-art performance in Mandarin ASR and singing lyrics recognition.
- [OpenSenseNova/SenseNova-U1](https://github.com/OpenSenseNova/SenseNova-U1) — ⭐ 1,131 · `Python` · Multimodal — SenseNova-U1 is a native unified multimodal AI model, built from first principles with a comprehensive paradigm. It is recognized as a trending model on Hugging Face.
- [FunAudioLLM/Fun-ASR](https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/Fun-ASR) — ⭐ 1,118 · `Python` · Audio — Fun-ASR is an end-to-end large model for speech recognition, supporting multilingual input across 31 languages. It converts spoken audio into text and facilitates audio understanding.
- [InternLM/Intern-S1](https://github.com/InternLM/Intern-S1) — ⭐ 785 · Multimodal — This repository presents Intern-S1 (and S2-Preview), a scientific multimodal foundation model. It excels in diverse scientific tasks, notably demonstrating advanced capabilities in generating material crystal structures and general multimodal understanding.
- [jingyaogong/minimind-o](https://github.com/jingyaogong/minimind-o) — ⭐ 662 · `Python` · Multimodal — MiniMind-O is a 0.1B parameter omnimodal AI model, trained from scratch to process and generate text, speech, and images, functioning as a complete multimodal system for listening, speaking, and seeing.
- [OpenMOSS/MOSS-Audio](https://github.com/OpenMOSS/MOSS-Audio) — ⭐ 432 · `Python` · Audio — MOSS-Audio is an open-source foundation model for unified audio understanding, capable of handling speech, sound, music, captioning, QA, and reasoning tasks in various real-world scenarios.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3-preview](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3-preview) — ⭐ 310 · `Python` · Models — Hy3 preview is a Tencent large language model (MoE) focused on advanced reasoning, coding, and agent capabilities, demonstrating frontier-level performance in STEM and competitive mathematics.
- [AEON-7/Qwen3.6-27B-AEON-Ultimate-Uncensored-DFlash](https://github.com/AEON-7/Qwen3.6-27B-AEON-Ultimate-Uncensored-DFlash) — ⭐ 135 · `Python` · Models — This repository offers a deployment guide and resources for an optimized, uncensored Qwen3.6-27B language model. It utilizes NVFP4 hardware quantization to enable efficient and fast token decoding on high-end NVIDIA GPUs.
- [AMAP-ML/DreamX-World](https://github.com/AMAP-ML/DreamX-World) — ⭐ 120 · `Python` · Multimodal — DreamX-World is a general-purpose interactive world model trained on diverse data, including Unreal Engine environments, gameplay footage, and real-world videos. It leverages reinforcement learning and distillation for efficient inference and action following within simulated or real environments.
- [huggingface/nanowhale](https://github.com/huggingface/nanowhale) — ⭐ 113 · `Python` · Models — HuggingFace's Nanowhale is a small 110M parameter language model built with the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. It's designed for experimenting with advanced features like MLA, MoE, Hyper-Connections, and multi-token prediction, and includes pre-training steps.
- [BlinkDL/Albatross](https://github.com/BlinkDL/Albatross) — ⭐ 110 · `Cuda` · Models — Albatross refers to an implementation related to the RWKV-7 G1g LLM, notable for its high-performance decoding capabilities.
- [yfyang007/ControlLight](https://github.com/yfyang007/ControlLight) — ⭐ 62 · `Python` · Image — A controllable low-light enhancement model (LoRA) designed to improve visibility in dark images. It aims to preserve the original scene structure, visual content, and fine-grained details during the enhancement process.
- [SHAILAB-IPEC/EO1](https://github.com/SHAILAB-IPEC/EO1) — ⭐ 54 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Robotics — EO-1 is an open-source unified embodied foundation model series, providing the core AI models that enable robotic systems to perform tasks. It serves as the foundational code for embodied AI applications.
- [H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2](https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2) — ⭐ 40 · `Python` · Multimodal — HERMES++ introduces a unified world model focused on comprehensively understanding and generating 3D scenes within a driving context. It aims to create a holistic system for representing and simulating complex real-world driving environments.
- [microsoft/GridSFM](https://github.com/microsoft/GridSFM) — ⭐ 26 · `Python` · Models — This repository contains small foundation models specifically developed by Microsoft for analysis and applications within the power grid domain.
- [Stability-AI/stable-audio-3](https://github.com/Stability-AI/stable-audio-3) — ⭐ 23 · `Python` · Audio — This repository contains Stable Audio 3, a family of open-weight models designed for generating instrumental music and sound effects. These models are engineered for speed, offer editing capabilities, and are trained on a diverse dataset of licensed and Creative Commons audio.
- [sapientinc/HRM-Text](https://github.com/sapientinc/HRM-Text) — ⭐ 22 · `Python` · Text — A 1-billion parameter text generation model based on the Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM) architecture, designed for improved task completion and latent space reasoning.
- [HiDream-ai/HiDream-O1-Image](https://github.com/HiDream-ai/HiDream-O1-Image) — ⭐ 20 · `Python` · Image — This repository contains the code for the HiDream-O1-Image model, which is designed for generating or processing images in various image-related artificial intelligence tasks.
- [FrameX-AI/Stream-T1](https://github.com/FrameX-AI/Stream-T1) — ⭐ 18 · `Python` · Image — This repository provides Stream-T1, a streaming diffusion model for high-resolution and fast text-to-image generation. It is designed to efficiently generate detailed images from textual prompts.
